title: ILIKE clauses don't work on certain characters
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR, description VARCHAR);
CREATE TABLE related_table (test_id INT, FOREIGN KEY (test_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE LOWER('%ë%');
key_bug_features: ILIKE clause fails with specific special characters
